THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, GEORGE WILLIAMS, JACQUELINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 720 HAIGHT STREET, APT. #201, SF, CA $3,516.69 RENT, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,696.69, LEASE FORFEITED
